goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'london kings cross' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'monday' and should 'arrive by 15:45'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'north' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should 'include free parking' and should have 'a star of 4'.
Make sure you get 'hotel type', 'phone number', and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from london kings cross and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on monday and should arrive by 15:45
Make sure you get travel time and departure time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should include free wifi
The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 4
Make sure you get hotel type, phone number, and address
